sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52430" key="*xei/meros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">-Χείμερος,</orth> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n52430.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unfitted to endure winter</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:41" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.41</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
